languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

languages.text: "Да бросьте. Топить печаль в бутылке как раз эффективней некуда. Пара кружек чего покрепче и горести как рукой снимет! Во всяком случае, до утра".
"Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."
languages.original_text: "Да бросьте. Топить печаль в бутылке как раз эффективней некуда. Пара кружек чего покрепче и горести как рукой снимет! Во всяком случае, до утра".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."
"Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."
"Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

languages.text: «Oh, venga ya. Ahogar las penas en el alcohol es tan eficaz como ha sido siempre. ¡Unas rondas de algo más fuerte le quitarán los males! Hasta la mañana siguiente, al menos».
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, venga ya. Ahogar las penas en el alcohol es tan eficaz como ha sido siempre. ¡Unas rondas de algo más fuerte le quitarán los males! Hasta la mañana siguiente, al menos».

languages.text: 「あら、よしてよ。悲しみを酒で紛らわすのは、今も昔も変わらず効くんだから。何杯か強いのをやれば、悩みなんて吹き飛ぶわよ！ 少なくとも朝まではね」
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: 「あら、よしてよ。悲しみを酒で紛らわすのは、今も昔も変わらず効くんだから。何杯か強いのをやれば、悩みなんて吹き飛ぶわよ！ 少なくとも朝まではね」

languages.text: “噢，得了吧。借酒消愁向来百试百灵。几轮烈酒下肚，烦恼全消！起码能撑到早上。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: “噢，得了吧。借酒消愁向来百试百灵。几轮烈酒下肚，烦恼全消！起码能撑到早上。”

languages.text: "Oh, kommt schon. Euren Kummer zu ertränken ist so effektiv wie eh und je. Ein paar Runden Schnaps und Eure Sorgen sind wie weggeblasen. Jedenfalls bis morgen."
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, kommt schon. Euren Kummer zu ertränken ist so effektiv wie eh und je. Ein paar Runden Schnaps und Eure Sorgen sind wie weggeblasen. Jedenfalls bis morgen."

languages.text: « Oh, allez... Noyer son chagrin au fond de la bouteille, c'est toujours efficace. Quelques tournées d'alcool fort, et toutes vos peines s'envolent ! Du moins, jusqu'au matin. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, allez... Noyer son chagrin au fond de la bouteille, c'est toujours efficace. Quelques tournées d'alcool fort, et toutes vos peines s'envolent ! Du moins, jusqu'au matin. »

languages.text: "Hadi ama. Kederlerini şişede boğmak çok bir işe yaramaz. Daha sert bir şeyden birkaç kadehse kederlerini alıp götürür! En azından sabaha kadar."
languages.original_text: "Oh, come. Drowning your sorrows in a bottle is just as effective as ever. A few rounds of something stronger will take your sorrows away! At least until morning."

traits.locale_text: "Hadi ama. Kederlerini şişede boğmak çok bir işe yaramaz. Daha sert bir şeyden birkaç kadehse kederlerini alıp götürür! En azından sabaha kadar."
